heading: Transfer of material and equipment to the Architect of the Capitol
label: 7689 Transfer of material and equipment to the Architect of the Capitol
text: The Secretary of the Army is authorized to transfer, without payment, to the Architect of the Capitol, such material and equipment, not required by the Department of the Army, as the Architect may request for use at the Capitol power plant, the Capitol, and the Senate and House Office Buildings.
notes: Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–232section 4689 of this title2004— struck out “Building” after “Capitol power plant, the Capitol”.Pub. L. 108–375

Effective Date of 2018 AmendmentAmendment by effective , with provision for the coordination of amendments and special rule for certain redesignations, see , set out as a note preceding .Pub. L. 115–232section 800 of Pub. L. 115–232section 3001 of this titleFeb. 1, 2019
